title: PSball's Cosmos 1 (AU) to 1,000 (Blocks) Cosmic Horizons Addon
description: The datapack and resource pack for my addon. It adds many real objects, like the moons in the solar system with a radius over 100 kilometers, as well as rogue planets, with plans to add more exoplanets in the future.
body:
--Disclaimer--
The data pack file AND the resource pack file are BOTH required for gameplay!! If you don't have the resource pack, then the custom planets and moons are all black, and if you don't have the data pack, then the planets and moons won't show up in the first place!!

--Description--
I couldn't help but notice that the original Cosmic Horizons mod doesn't add many real celestial bodies, so I decided I'd fix that myself by adding them in. It's gonna have real dwarf planets, moons, exoplanets, rogue planets, black holes (and "time travel"), and many more objects like nebulae if the mod allows them to be made via data packs in the future!

--Current planets, moons, etc--
